name: Dr. Ina Stephens
bio: Dr. Ina Stephens is a pediatric infectious disease specialist and Associate Medical Director of the UVA Health Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome and Hypermobility Disorders Center. Recognizing the tremendous unmet need for patients and families affected by hypermobility disorders, she has played an integral role in expanding access to expert, multidisciplinary care for individuals with Ehlers-Danlos syndromes and Hypermobility Spectrum Disorders. Dr. Stephens is known for her compassionate, patient-centered approach and her commitment to improving outcomes for those living with complex chronic illnesses. Through her clinical work, education, and leadership, she continues to advance awareness and understanding of hypermobility disorders both within UVA Health and beyond.
